response.global_analysis: Segment contains dialogue from Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope following a performance. Audio phonetically matches the scene description provided in the reference JSON (a conversation-focused segment). No vocal music lyrics were provided or detected, so transcription is based entirely on the spoken audio and on-screen award titles. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal activity, and segmentation follows natural pauses and speaker turns.
